title: Cloud & DevOps
description: There's something satisfying about turning a project into a production-ready system. When it all comes together with cloud, automation, and deployment pipelines, it feels especially rewarding.

title: Machine Learning
description: I'm fascinated by how machines can learn from data and make predictions. I enjoy exploring different algorithms and techniques, and applying them to real-world problems to see what works best.

title: Backend Dev
description: This is where my interest in development began. Discovering what happens behind the scenes of a website got me hooked. I enjoy building reliable and scalable backends that can handle real users and real traffic.
